task_completion.description: The agent opened the DICOM viewer or medical imaging software and loaded the CT scan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graphical application displaying a 256x256 image (a gradient with a central circle) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The agent probed the pixel density at coordinate (128, 128).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The mouse cursor or a probe tool is positioned near the center of the image (approx. 128, 128), and the software UI displays a pixel value near 2000 or an HU value near 976.

task_completion.description: The agent probed the pixel density at coordinate (64, 64).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The mouse cursor or a probe tool is positioned in the upper-left quadrant of the image (approx. 64, 64), and the software UI displays a pixel value near 1000 or an HU value near -24.

task_completion.description: The agent probed the pixel density at coordinate (192, 192).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The mouse cursor or a probe tool is positioned in the lower-right quadrant of the image (approx. 192, 192), and the software UI displays a pixel value near 3000 or an HU value near 1976.

task_completion.description: The agent formatted the probed results into the required text structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing the exact header 'Pixel Probe Results' followed by 'Coordinate (128,128): [value]', 'Coordinate (64,64): [value]', and 'Coordinate (192,192): [value]'.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the text file to the correct directory with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor's title bar, save dialog, or a terminal window confirms the file is saved as 'pixel_probe_results.txt' inside the '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical interface of the imaging software to probe the values rather than extracting them programmatically.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively moving the mouse over the image in the viewer to read the values from the UI, rather than running a Python/bash script to read the DICOM array.

integrity.description: The values recorded in the text file match the values actually observed in the viewer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numeric values typed into the text editor correspond to the values shown in the viewer's probe tooltips or status bar during the probing steps.

integrity.description: The agent did not guess the values or copy them from an external source without checking.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent actually navigates to the three specific coordinates in the image viewer before writing the values down.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output file path: /home/ga/DICOM/exports/pixel_probe_results.txt. Target coordinates and expected values (Raw / HU): (128,128) -> 2000 / 976; (64,64) -> 1000 / -24; (192,192) -> 3000 / 1976. Value tolerance is ±100 units. Coordinate tolerance is ±5 pixels. The agent is allowed to record either the Raw pixel value or the HU value.
